statement: In every magma, Equation 1495 (`x = (y * x) * (y * (z * y))`) implies Equation 2212 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0848
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op y (op z y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op x x))
